title: Utility diversion approval delay
description: Final diversion approval for the Cheras North Station corridor remains pending with the utility authority.
cause: Late response from authority and unresolved crossing method comments
mitigation: Escalate through employer, submit revised method statement, extend night shift crew once permit is granted

title: Unidentified underground services at Cheras North
description: Additional telecom ducts and an uncharted water main were encountered near Cheras North Station.
mitigation: Trial pits, redesign pile cap sequence, coordinate service protection with authority
linked_work_package: Cheras North Station Structural and Architectural

title: Prolonged heavy rainfall affecting pier works
description: High rainfall reduced crane windows and concrete productivity during February.
cause: Seasonal weather and saturated ground conditions
mitigation: Resequence spans, move crews to sheltered work fronts, use weekend recovery shifts

title: Precast segment supply bottleneck
description: Supplier advised mould maintenance and manpower shortage could reduce weekly output for two weeks.
cause: Single source dependency and unplanned mould downtime
mitigation: Approve alternate casting yard capacity and prioritise critical spans

title: Interface drawing approval lag
description: Signalling and traction power interface drawings are not yet fully approved.
cause: Multi-party review cycle between civil, systems, and client reviewers
mitigation: Weekly interface war room, issue comment tracker, split package into phased approvals

title: Pier reinforcement NCR closure not independently verified
description: NCR-014 was reported as closed by site, but independent QA verification is still pending.
cause: Corrective action completed before full QA closeout
mitigation: Complete joint inspection and update NCR register before next concrete pour

title: Traffic management permit restrictions
description: Weekend lane closure windows may be reduced after public complaints.
cause: Community sensitivity near one station work front
mitigation: Revise traffic diversion plan and increase public notices

title: Steelwork subcontractor productivity shortfall
description: Pandan Gateway steelwork installation rate remains below tender assumption.
cause: Crew turnover and crane sharing with other trades
mitigation: Rebaseline crew plan and add second shift for secondary steel
linked_work_package: Pandan Gateway Station Structural and Architectural

title: Architectural finishes revision request
description: Employer requested higher-spec finishes at Pandan Gateway and Cheras North public areas.
mitigation: Price the change separately and prevent execution before instruction is formalised
linked_work_package: Pandan Gateway Station Structural and Architectural

title: Delayed access handover for systems contractor
description: Systems contractor may not receive handed-over rooms and cable routes on time.
cause: Cheras North civil sequence remains behind plan
mitigation: Advance partial handover strategy and prioritise equipment rooms

title: Near-miss from lifting exclusion breach
description: One near-miss was recorded during lifting operations near the pier cap zone.
cause: Subcontractor banksman rotation and weak barrier discipline
mitigation: Refresh lifting briefing, add dedicated spotter, tighten exclusion zone barriers

title: Pending variation orders converting to claims
description: Several pending VOs may harden into claims if design direction is delayed.
cause: Instruction timing remains unclear for multiple scope changes
mitigation: Freeze evidence trail, issue notices early, track instructed vs uninstructed work weekly

title: Restricted working hours due to community complaints
description: Residents near Cheras North Station requested shorter night working windows.
cause: Noise and truck movement during utility works
mitigation: Add acoustic barriers and shift high-noise activities earlier in the night

title: Readiness for integrated systems testing slipping
description: Integrated testing readiness may move by 4-6 weeks if interface approvals stay partial.
cause: Design and access dependencies are compounding
mitigation: Prepare phased T&C plan tied to partial handovers and approve temporary workarounds
